summary: A user points the platform to a new repository. Mediated mode analyzes the structure, identifies the core patterns, and generates a prompt for an LLM to perform a deep architectural audit. A user wants to migrate a legacy Java project to a modern Spring Boot architecture. Mediated mode identifies the legacy components (Servlets, manual XML config) and prepares a transition roadmap prompt. A user needs comprehensive documentation for a complex mixed-language workspace. Mediated mode discovers the relationships between modules and synthesizes a prompt to generate high-quality READMEs and API docs.
